message: Hello technician, my kitchen outlets suffered a short-circuit burn. Are you available today?
Yes, I am available. I will generate a formal job quote and attach it to your order screen shortly.
Hi Admin, I uploaded my bank payment slip for the AC job, but the system status hasn't updated yet.
Understood. Our backend team is manually validating the transaction details with the bank right now.
Submitting Milestone 1 updates: Solar structural frames are securely bolted to the roof.
Looks great. The pictures verify the progress. I will tap the escrow approval button now.
How many business days does it take to route wallet earnings out to my external bank profile?
Payout requests are safely cleared and dispatched to your registered account within 24 hours.
Requesting a refund for order 009 as the scheduled technician missed the morning appointment.
Why is my account status labeled as Suspended? Please let me know what went wrong.
